summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) People Experience Program professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with cross-functional stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve people experience—through operationally excellent, human-centered programs.

bullets.text: Manage {coord|end-to-end lifecycles for 20+ programs} and 10+ vendors—procurement, renewals, and ongoing partnership—refining delivery and {coord|operations}
Optimize cross-functional {coord|program logistics} and documentation for 70+ staff, standardizing processes that reduced onboarding time by 75%
Facilitate {prog|training} webinars for 600+ participants and run needs assessments with 25+ {cross|stakeholders}, using {tools|AI tools} to design 3 new programs
Partner {cross|cross-functionally} with Marketing, Tech, and Sales, driving continuous improvement and a 78% program enrollment rate
Analyzed 2,000+ {data|employee experiences} to amplify employee voice and guide C-suite decisions on satisfaction drivers
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed {ex|engagement} strategies
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Optimized {coord|onboarding} for new hires across 3 global locations via process analysis and clarifying job responsibilities
Initiated a DEI pilot by {prog|facilitating} an Inclusive Leadership workshop for 12 senior leaders, later expanded to 23 locations
Facilitated organizational change by directing a Mergers & Acquisitions project, overseeing {cross|cross-functional stakeholders}
Strengthened engagement via an HR newsletter and award-winning well-being initiatives, recognized among 1,000+ competitors
Facilitate CEO/HR discovery interviews to diagnose absenteeism, then {data|analyze} 300+ leave cases—surfacing $362K in costs that drove policy redesigns
Conduct focus groups and 1:1 interviews with an NGO leadership team to surface decision-making and {cross|accountability} gaps
Developed proficiency across various HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation details
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
